---
title: "Novica Nakov's resume"
author: Novica Nakov
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output:
  pagedown::html_resume:
    # set it to true for a self-contained HTML page but it'll take longer to render
    self_contained: true
---

Aside
================================================================================


![Novica Nakov](https://avatars2.githubusercontent.com/u/165724?s=460&v=4){width=80%}


Contact Info {#contact}
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

- <i class="fa fa-envelope"></i> nnovica@gmail.com
- <i class="fa fa-github"></i> [github.com/novica](https://github.com/novica)
- <i class="fa fa-github"></i> [github.com/discindo](https://github.com/discindo)
- For more information, please contact me via email.


Technology Skills {#skills}
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

- Skilled in *R* and *Shiny*, data wrangling, analytics and visualizations using the *Tidyverse* and *RMarkdown*.

- Comfortable at the *Linux* command line and with distributed version control systems such as *Git*.

- Comfortable with writing *SQL* queries getting data in and out of *R*.

- Basic knowledge of *Python*, *Pandas*, and *NumPy*.


Disclaimer {#disclaimer}
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

This resume was made with the R package [**pagedown**](https://github.com/rstudio/pagedown).

Last updated on `r Sys.Date()`.



Main
================================================================================

Novica Nakov {#title}
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### R, Tidyverse, Shiny for all things data by night. Finance,  accounting, and law by day. Father always.


**Personal summary** I spend my time working with people, numbers, and software. I am interested in exploring the meeting points of technology, law, society, and politics. I am always looking at the big picture, but also pay attention to details. It seems I talk a lot, and mostly about Free Software. I can write text, and code. I continuously learn new things. MRes Human Rights and International Politics, (Chevening Award). B.Sc. in Economics.


Professional Experience {data-icon=suitcase}
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### Data Analysis and Visualization

Freelance

Skopje, North Macedonia

2015 - Present

I started learning R for data science as part of my studies at the University of Glasgow where I had to do an analysis of a large dataset for my thesis. Since then I have been doing various personal and professional projects in R in order to keep my skills up to date and be able to pursue a career in data science.

::: concise
- Worked on a project for a local [NGO](https://idscs.org.mk) for a presentation of data of public companies from North Macedonia using [Shiny](https://kojupravuva.idscs.org.mk).
- Some personal projects and demos are available on my Github page.
- Example 1: An [analysis](https://discindo.github.io/natochak/) of Macedonian bicycle accidents (see [Rmd](https://github.com/discindo/natochak/blob/master/accidents.Rmd)).
- Example 2: A [shiny app](https://novica.shinyapps.io/nmkmappr/) that plots statistical indicators on a map (see [github](https://github.com/discindo/mappr)).
- I contribute code to few *R* projects. See my github for more.
:::

### Finance and business development adviser

IBorn.net DOO - Skopje.

Skopje, North Macedonia

2013 - Present

This is my part time / on call professional engagement, usually few hours per week.

::: concise
- Implemented accounting and finance software.
- Advise on various finance and operations matters.
- Work on identifying potential clients and employees.
- On some occasions worked on web development with Drupal.
:::


### Finance and operations manager

Trgotekstil ZS AD - Skopje.

Skopje, North Macedonia

2005 - Present

This is my full time job. 

::: concise
- Responsible for all things finance, and VAT and end-of-year reporting.
- Negotiating contracts with clients.
- Training new staff.
- Managed a team of 4-7 people.
- Expanded the company business to accounting services.
:::

### Various things Free Software

Free Software Macedonia

Skopje, North Macedonia

2002 - Present

This is my volunteering activity. Currently I am organizing TidyTuesday, the R for data science weekly learning meetup, at the [Skopje hacklab](https://discindo.github.io/TidyTuesdayAtKIKA/).

::: concise
- Involved with the free software community for a very long time.
- Working mostly on localization, advocacy and policy building.
- Held many presentations and talks, coordinated various events and teams.
:::


Education {data-icon=graduation-cap data-concise=true}
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### University of Glasgow

MRes Human Rights and International Politics, (Chevening Award).

Glasgow, UK

2016

Thesis: Human rights and pirate libraries: Can sci-hub.org-enabled improvements in access to scientific literature help fulfill human rights?

### Ss. Cyril and Methodius University in Skopje

B.Sc. in Economics

Skopje, North Macedonia

2005

Thesis: The Macedonian Software Industry: Government's Role and Possibilities for Development

Languages {data-icon=language}
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

- English: Professional
- German: Beginner (Studied at school and university, but have no active use.)
- Spanish: Beginner
